
[source layer]
  (F-series)
    [must-fix] UF-F4 main.tex — \singlespacing overrides template's \doublespacing (required: no line-spacing override at source level (template's \doublespacing applies; documented exceptions handled inside captions / longtable / itemize / abstract / bib))
      fix: Remove the line-spacing override; the UF template's `\doublespacing` (cls:198) sets the required body spacing with documented exceptions.
      see: https://github.com/YuZh98/latex2ufdissertation/blob/main/docs/uf-rules.md#uf-f4--line-spacing

Summary: 1 must-fix, 0 review.

---
Note: Advisory (not a finding): The ufdissertation template produces untagged PDFs (no /StructTreeRoot, /MarkInfo, or /Lang entries). PDF/UA accessibility features such as tag structure, alt-text, table-header semantics, and reading order are therefore outside the scope of this tool's verification. This is a known template limitation, not a violation detected in your submission.
